name: Lightning Bolt 10K
notes: First race back after off-season. Logged for history, but excluded from prediction — 3+ months old and early-season fitness isn't representative of current form for a race this far out.

name: Bourton Mile
notes: Wet but not windy — rain alone over a mile isn't considered a meaningful performance disruptor here.

name: Cardiff 5K (previous edition)
notes: Same race, earlier date — useful direct comparison for this year's target.

name: Cotswold Way Relay (leg)
notes: Respiratory episode in heat. Relay leg, off-road and extremely hilly — not comparable to a flat standalone race. Excluded from Riegel projection.

name: Cardiff 5K
notes: Chip time 17:48, gun 17:53. New fastest 5K of 2026 (PB by 1m2s vs previous 2026 time). 104th of 400 overall, 12th of 48 in M45 age group (top 50). 24-25C. Bang on plan through 3km, started to fade around 4.5km - stone in shoe caused a blister but nothing major. Nike Vaporfly.
